daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 Launches to ISS

top_events.title: SpaceX Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 Launch
top_events.description: The 34th commercial resupply mission to the ISS by SpaceX, delivering critical supplies and research materials.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast
top_events.description: Moderate auroral activity expected, but visibility limited to higher latitudes.
top_events.action: Check local conditions if near 60° latitude

top_events.title: Zhuque-2E Launch Delayed
top_events.description: The Zhuque-2E launch has been delayed to May 14 due to NOTAM updates.
top_events.action: Stay updated for new launch time
